rules.rule: A failing test must exist before any implementation code is written for a behavior.
The failing test must be confirmed to fail for the correct reason before implementation is written.
Test method names must follow: ShouldDo{Outcome}[When{Condition}]Async.
Every test must be structured with // given, // when, and // then comment sections.
All test input values must be randomized using Filler<T> or equivalent; hard-coded domain values are forbidden.
Expected variables must be created using DeepClone() to dereference them from input variables.
Every test must end with Times.Once verification on expected mock calls and VerifyNoOtherCalls() on all mocks.
Test classes must be partial and organized to mirror the partial class structure of the system under test.
